# Toolsify

> Free online calculators, converters, and utility tools. Fast, accurate, and no signup required.

Toolsify provides browser-based tools for math, finance, fitness, text, design, converters, and developers. Each tool has a public JSON API. Discover all tools via [/api/tools-index](https://toolsify.online/api/tools-index).

## Main pages

- [Home](https://toolsify.online/)
- [All Tools](https://toolsify.online/tools)
- [Browse Categories](https://toolsify.online/tools/categories)
- [Contact](https://toolsify.online/contact)
- [Privacy Policy](https://toolsify.online/privacy-policy)

## Categories

- [Math & Calculators](https://toolsify.online/tools/math)
- [Finance](https://toolsify.online/tools/finance)
- [Fitness & Health](https://toolsify.online/tools/fitness)
- [Text Tools](https://toolsify.online/tools/text)
- [Design & Color](https://toolsify.online/tools/color)
- [Converters](https://toolsify.online/tools/converter)
- [Developer Tools](https://toolsify.online/tools/developer)

## All tools (28)

- [Percentage Calculator](https://toolsify.online/percentage-calculator) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/percentage-calculator`
- [Simple Interest Calculator](https://toolsify.online/simple-interest-calculator) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/simple-interest-calculator`
- [Discount Calculator](https://toolsify.online/discount-calculator) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/discount-calculator`
- [Average Calculator](https://toolsify.online/average-calculator) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/average-calculator`
- [EMI Calculator](https://toolsify.online/emi-calculator) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/emi-calculator`
- [Compound Interest Calculator](https://toolsify.online/compound-interest-calculator) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/compound-interest-calculator`
- [Salary Calculator](https://toolsify.online/salary-calculator) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/salary-calculator`
- [Tip Calculator](https://toolsify.online/tip-calculator) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/tip-calculator`
- [Percentage Change Calculator](https://toolsify.online/percentage-change-calculator) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/percentage-change-calculator`
- [BMI Calculator](https://toolsify.online/bmi-calculator) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/bmi-calculator`
- [Calorie Calculator](https://toolsify.online/calorie-calculator) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/calorie-calculator`
- [Ideal Weight Calculator](https://toolsify.online/ideal-weight-calculator) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/ideal-weight-calculator`
- [Age Calculator](https://toolsify.online/age-calculator) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/age-calculator`
- [Word Counter](https://toolsify.online/word-counter) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/word-counter`
- [Character Counter](https://toolsify.online/character-counter) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/character-counter`
- [Case Converter](https://toolsify.online/case-converter) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/case-converter`
- [Text Repeater](https://toolsify.online/text-repeater) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/text-repeater`
- [Lorem Ipsum Generator](https://toolsify.online/lorem-ipsum-generator) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/lorem-ipsum-generator`
- [Color Converter](https://toolsify.online/color-converter) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/color-converter`
- [Unit Converter](https://toolsify.online/unit-converter) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/unit-converter`
- [Regex Tester & Debugger](https://toolsify.online/regex-tester) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/regex-tester`
- [JSON Formatter & Validator](https://toolsify.online/json-formatter) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/json-formatter`
- [JWT Decoder & Inspector](https://toolsify.online/jwt-decoder) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/jwt-decoder`
- [Cron Expression Generator](https://toolsify.online/cron-expression-generator) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/cron-expression-generator`
- [CSS Gradient Generator](https://toolsify.online/gradient-generator) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/gradient-generator`
- [Color Palette Generator](https://toolsify.online/color-palette-generator) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/color-palette-generator`
- [Hash Generator](https://toolsify.online/hash-generator) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/hash-generator`
- [Markdown Editor & Preview](https://toolsify.online/markdown-editor) — API: `https://toolsify.online/api/tools/markdown-editor`

## Agent discovery

- [Tool registry API](https://toolsify.online/api/tools-index)
- [OpenAPI spec](https://toolsify.online/api/openapi)
- [auth.md](https://toolsify.online/auth.md) — agent registration instructions
- [OAuth Protected Resource Metadata](https://toolsify.online/.well-known/oauth-protected-resource)
- [OAuth Authorization Server Metadata](https://toolsify.online/.well-known/oauth-authorization-server)

- [Sitemap](https://toolsify.online/sitemap.xml)
